channel.title: Personal site for Domenick J. Braccia
channel.description: Recent content on Personal site for Domenick J. Braccia

item.title: CV
item.description: Domenick J. Braccia Currently PhD candidate at the University of Maryland studying bioinformatics and computational biology. Research interests Affects of the gut microbiome on human health and disease. Designing experiments and computational workflows to answer complex biological questions. Writing algorithms to work with Next Generation Sequence data. Education 2017 - present PhD candidate in Computational Biology and Bioinformatics. University of Maryland, College Park, MD 2012 - 2016 BS in Physics + Minor in Mathematics Pennsylvania State University, State College, PA

item.title: Book Review; The Power of Habit
item.description: TL;DR The Power of Habit by Charles Duhigg is an engaging and empowering book all about how each one of us truly are – as Duhigg and many others have noted – creatures of habit. Nearly everything we do from how we talk to our friends and loved ones to what we “choose” to eat for lunch each day is really just a habit that has been ingrained in our minds over time.
